startPoint.en: Talk to Grubfoot in the Dorgeshuun mine, north of Dorgesh-Kaan. (via )
startPoint.es: Habla con Grubfoot en la mina Dorgeshuun, al norte de Dorgesh-Kaan. (via)

children.name: Ironman Mode
children.display: Ironmen can easily obtain a clean toadflax from the Brimhaven Agility Arena

items.name: Black mushroom ink
items.display: Black mushroom ink (obtainable during the quest)

children.name: Vial
children.display: Empty vial (if you don't already have the black mushroom ink)

items.name: Must have enough backpack space to unequip all items
items.display: Must have enough backpack space to unequip all items

recommended.name: Ardougne lodestone
recommended.display: Activated Ardougne, Draynor, Lumbridge and Port Sarim lodestones

recommended.name: Dramen staff
recommended.display: A dramen/lunar staff for using fairy rings (unnecessary if the quest A Fairy Tale III - Battle at Ork's Rift has been completed)

recommended.name: Skills necklace
recommended.display: A skills necklace for faster travel to the Makeover Mage and Goblin Cave

recommended.name: Dorgesh-kaan sphere
recommended.display: A Dorgesh-kaan sphere, or 2 law runes and 1 molten glass to trade for one, if not using the fairy rings

rewards.name: Goblin Temple
rewards.display: Access to the Goblin Temple (with an altar to recharge prayer points)

rewards.name: Yu'biusk
rewards.display: Access to Yu'biusk, using fairy ring code BLQ

rewards.name: Plain of mud sphere
rewards.display: Ability to buy moving-over-distance spheres (plain of mud sphere) that transports you to the goblin cave

rewards.name: Symbol of Bandos
rewards.display: Access to the Bandos gravestone (talk to Blasidar the sculptor in Keldagrim)

rewards.name: Beacon
rewards.display: Ability to access the beacon located near the Goblin Village, west of the Ice Mountain

rewards.name: Catacombs and Tombs
rewards.display: Catacombs and Tombs (Catacombs of a Goblin Temple)

text.en: Talk to Grubfoot in the Dorgeshuun Mines.
text.es: Habla con Grubfoot en las Minas Dorgeshuun.

chatOptions: 2 Mistag, why won't you let Grubfoot into the city?

text.en: Dismiss any familiar or Grubfoot won't follow you.
text.es: Despide a cualquier familiar, o Grubfoot no te seguirá.

text.en: With Grubfoot following, enter Dorgesh-Kaan using the door to the south and head north-west where Oldak is.
text.es: Con Grubfoot siguiéndote, entra en Dorgesh-Kaan usando la puerta del sur y dirígete al noroeste, donde está Oldak.

text.en: In the north-west room, talk to Zanik.
text.es: En la habitación del noroeste, habla con Zanik.

chatOptions: 3 So why have you come to talk to Zanik?
2 How do you know your dream was true?
1 I promise not to tell anyone where the temple is.

text.en: Black mushroom ink or a vial, toadflax potion (unfinished)
An extra vial or Black mushroom ink, and an extra toadflax potion (unfinished) to make a second potion. (Or, you can attempt to save a dose from your first potion)
If you forgot to bring the toadflax potion, proceed until Zanik has entered into the temple.
text.es: Si olvidaste traer la poción de toadflax, continúa hasta que Zanik haya entrado en el templo.

text.en: Otherwise, you will need to go back to Oldak in Dorgesh-Kaan to meet with her, and provide him two law runes and one molten glass.
text.es: De lo contrario, tendrás que volver con Oldak en Dorgesh-Kaan para reunirte con ella, y darle dos runas de ley y un vidrio fundido.

text.en: Once you teleport with Zanik, head north-west to the temple entrance blocked by two goblin guards.
text.es: Una vez te teletransportes con Zanik, dirígete al noroeste hacia la entrada del templo bloqueada por dos guardias goblin.

text.en: Pick and grind a black mushroom into an empty vial if you don't already have black mushroom ink.
text.es: Recoge y muele un hongo negro en un vial vacío si aún no tienes tinta de hongo negro.

text.en: Talk to the guards and they will allow Zanik to pass into the temple.
text.es: Habla con los guardias y dejarán que Zanik pase al templo.

text.en: Talk to the Makeover Mage south-west of Falador.
text.es: Habla con el Makeover Mage al suroeste de Falador.

chatOptions: 4 Can you turn me into a goblin?
1 I need to slip past some goblin guards.
3 Can you turn me into a goblin or not?

text.en: Use the pharmakos berries on an unfinished toadflax potion to create the goblin potion.
text.es: Usa las bayas pharmakos en una poción de toadflax sin terminar para crear la poción de goblin.

text.en: (Optional) After making the potion, collect another set of pharmakos berries if planning to complete the Contract Claws mystery.
text.es: (Opcional) Después de hacer la poción, recoge otro conjunto de bayas pharmakos si planeas completar el misterio de Contract Claws.

text.en: Head to the goblin cave (just north of the Ardougne lodestone).
text.es: Dirígete a la cueva goblin (justo al norte de la piedra de viaje de Ardougne).

text.en: goblin mail, Enough free inventory spaces to unequip all items
Unequip all items and dismiss any followers.
text.es: Quítate todo el equipo y despide a cualquier acompañante.

text.en: In front of the goblin guards, drink the goblin potion (pick any goblin appearance).
text.es: Frente a los guardias goblin, bebe la poción de goblin (elige cualquier apariencia goblin).

text.en: Climb down the entrance.
text.es: Baja por la entrada.

text.en: North, sitting on his throne, talk to the High Priest.
text.es: Al norte, sentado en su trono, habla con el High Priest.

chatOptions: 1 Can you tell me about Yu'biusk?
1 I understand the ways of the Big High War God.

text.en: Take the quiz.
text.es: Realiza el cuestionario.

chatOptions: 1 The Big High War God commands it.
2 Goblins were not mighty warriors before he chose us.
2 Lead goblins to victory over the whole world.

text.en: After the quiz, ask about Yu'biusk.
text.es: Después del cuestionario, pregunta sobre Yu'biusk.

chatOptions: 1 Can you tell me about Yu'biusk?

text.en: Dye your goblin mail black with the mushroom ink.
text.es: Tiñe tu cota goblin de negro con la tinta de hongo.

text.en: Wear the black goblin mail and go in the north-east room by talking to the goblin in the passage.
text.es: Ponte la cota goblin negra y entra en la habitación del noreste hablando con el goblin del pasillo.

text.en: Pickpocket the priest for a key. Keep this key. You will need it later.
text.es: Roba una llave al sacerdote. Guarda esta llave. La necesitarás más adelante.

text.en: Search the crate in the room to find the teleport sphere.
text.es: Registra la caja en la habitación para encontrar la esfera de teletransporte.

text.en: Talk to Zanik, she will teleport.
text.es: Habla con Zanik, ella se teletransportará.

chatOptions: 1 I have a teleport sphere here.

text.en: 5 coins, 1 black goblin mail, 1 raw slimy eel
Combat bracelet
Leave the cave.
text.es: Sal de la cueva.

text.en: You can equip a piece of equipment to be thrown out, then you can teleport to Draynor.
text.es: Puedes equipar una pieza de equipo para que te la quiten, y así podrás teletransportarte a Draynor.

text.en: Talk to Aggie in Draynor Village.
text.es: Habla con Aggie en Draynor Village.

chatOptions: 2 Can you make dyes for me please?
4 Can you make black or white dye?

text.en: Or, if Vampyre Slayer is complete.
text.es: O, si Vampyre Slayer está completa.

chatOptions: 2 Can you make dyes for me please?
4 Can you make black or white dye?

text.en: Teleport to Seers' Village lodestone and head south-west to Hemenster near the Ranging Guild. Alternatively, use a combat bracelet.
text.es: Teletranspórtate a la piedra de viaje de Seers' Village y dirígete al suroeste hasta Hemenster, cerca de la Ranging Guild. Alternativamente, usa un brazalete de combate.

text.en: Be sure to have a raw slimy eel or you will have to repeat the next steps.
text.es: Asegúrate de tener una anguila viscosa cruda o tendrás que repetir los siguientes pasos.

text.en: Attempt to open the gate near Morris.
text.es: Intenta abrir la puerta cerca de Morris.

chatOptions: 3 I need to catch a Hemenster whitefish.

text.en: After finishing the dialogue, open the gate.
text.es: Después de terminar el diálogo, abre la puerta.

text.en: Catch a whitefish.
text.es: Atrapa un pez blanco.

text.en: Return to Aggie and use the goblin mail on her.
text.es: Vuelve con Aggie y usa la cota goblin en ella.

text.en: Blue dye, yellow dye, purple dye, orange dye, enough backpack spaces to unequip all items
Unequip any items and dismiss any followers.
text.es: Quítate cualquier objeto equipado y despide a cualquier acompañante.

text.en: Go back to the goblin temple entrance, take a sip of your goblin potion, and equip your white goblin mail.
text.es: Vuelve a la entrada del templo goblin, bebe un sorbo de tu poción de goblin, y equípate la cota goblin blanca.

text.en: Enter the temple.
text.es: Entra en el templo.

text.en: Steal the white key from the priest in the room west of the temple.
text.es: Roba la llave blanca del sacerdote en la habitación al oeste del templo.

text.en: Remove the goblin mail to leave the room quicker.
text.es: Quítate la cota goblin para salir de la habitación más rápido.

text.en: Repeat the operation of stealing keys, dying your mail in the following order:
text.es: Repite la operación de robar llaves, tiñendo tu cota en el siguiente orden:

text.en: Yellow (north-west)
text.es: Amarillo (noroeste)

text.en: Purple (south-west)
text.es: Morado (suroeste)

text.en: Orange (south-east)
text.es: Naranja (sureste)

text.en: Blue (east)
text.es: Azul (este)

text.en: Enter the crypt (large door north of the temple).
text.es: Entra en la cripta (la puerta grande al norte del templo).

text.en: Prepare for battle by equipping weapons and armour.
text.es: Prepárate para la batalla equipando armas y armadura.

text.en: Use the Say-name option on each of the graves. After killing them, talk to them.
text.es: Usa la opción de decir el nombre en cada una de las tumbas. Después de matarlos, habla con ellos.

text.en: South-west: Snothead
text.es: Suroeste: Snothead

text.en: South-east: Snailfeet
text.es: Sureste: Snailfeet

text.en: North-west: Mosschin
text.es: Noroeste: Mosschin

text.en: North-east: Redeyes
text.es: Noreste: Redeyes

text.en: North: Strongbones (ignore his skeleton minions)
text.es: Norte: Strongbones (ignora a sus esbirros esqueleto)

text.en: Talk to Strongbones after defeating him.
text.es: Habla con Strongbones después de derrotarlo.

text.en: Return to Dorgesh-Kaan and speak with Zanik in the north-west (Oldak's lab).
text.es: Vuelve a Dorgesh-Kaan y habla con Zanik en el noroeste (el laboratorio de Oldak).

text.en: With a light source, head to the south end of Dorgesh-Kaan using fairy code AJQ. Alternatively, without using fairy rings:
text.es: Con una fuente de luz, dirígete al extremo sur de Dorgesh-Kaan usando el código de hadas AJQ. Alternativamente, sin usar los círculos de hadas:

text.en: Go up the stairs to the agility course.
text.es: Sube las escaleras hacia el curso de agilidad.

text.en: At the start of the agility course, climb down the ladder west of the agility cable.
text.es: Al inicio del curso de agilidad, baja por la escalera al oeste del cable de agilidad.

text.en: Follow the cave path east then south to the Fairy ring.
text.es: Sigue el camino de la cueva hacia el este y luego hacia el sur hasta el círculo de hadas.

text.en: Adjust the machines next to Oldak, use combination 9-4-1, activate the machine.
text.es: Ajusta las máquinas junto a Oldak, usa la combinación 9-4-1, activa la máquina.

text.en: Open the strange box in the north-western part of Yu'biusk for a cutscene.
text.es: Abre la caja extraña en la parte noroeste de Yu'biusk para ver una escena.

text.en: Continue dialogue with Oldak.
text.es: Continúa el diálogo con Oldak.

text.en: Quest complete!
text.es: ¡Misión completada!
